"[4] 97-S10 AFFIRM ON SIGALERT- 10EB FROM 22ND TO HARGRAVE- HEAVY TRAFFIC DUE TO CONSTRUCTION "
"[1] #3 and 4 LN WILL BE SHUT DOWN TIL 1400"
"[2] 76-N15 W/ TRFFC BRK WB JEO MONTEREY FOR LN CLOSURE"
